parameters.name: taskType
parameters.description:
UNKNOWN :UNKNOWN
USER_AVATAR :USER_AVATAR
POST :POST
POST_COVERAGE_IMAGE :POST_COVERAGE_IMAGE
POST_CONTENT_IMAGE :POST_CONTENT_IMAGE
POST_CONTENT :POST_CONTENT

parameters.name: seconds
parameters.description: The number of seconds from the epoch of 1970-01-01T00:00:00Z.

parameters.name: nanos
parameters.description:
The number of nanoseconds, later along the time-line, from the seconds field.
This is always positive, and never exceeds 999,999,999.

parameters.name: seconds
parameters.description: The number of seconds from the epoch of 1970-01-01T00:00:00Z.

parameters.name: nanos
parameters.description:
The number of nanoseconds, later along the time-line, from the seconds field.
This is always positive, and never exceeds 999,999,999.

seconds.description: The number of seconds from the epoch of 1970-01-01T00:00:00Z.

nanos.description:
The number of nanoseconds, later along the time-line, from the seconds field.
This is always positive, and never exceeds 999,999,999.

epochSecond.description:
Gets the number of seconds from the Java epoch of 1970-01-01T00:00:00Z.

The epoch second count is a simple incrementing count of seconds where second 0 is 1970-01-01T00:00:00Z. The nanosecond part is returned by{@link #getNano}.

nano.description:
Gets the number of nanoseconds, later along the time-line, from the start of the second.

The nanosecond-of-second value measures the total number of nanoseconds from the second returned by{@link #getEpochSecond}.

seconds.description: The number of seconds from the epoch of 1970-01-01T00:00:00Z.

nanos.description:
The number of nanoseconds, later along the time-line, from the seconds field.
This is always positive, and never exceeds 999,999,999.

Gets the number of seconds from the Java epoch of 1970-01-01T00:00:00Z.

The epoch second count is a simple incrementing count of seconds where second 0 is 1970-01-01T00:00:00Z. The nanosecond part is returned by{@link #getNano}.

The nanosecond-of-second value measures the total number of nanoseconds from the second returned by{@link #getEpochSecond}.

paged.description: Returns whether the current{@link Pageable} contains pagination information.

unpaged.description: Returns whether the current{@link Pageable} does not contain pagination information.

pageNumber.description: Returns the page to be returned.

pageSize.description: Returns the number of items to be returned.

offset.description: Returns the offset to be taken according to the underlying page and page size.

nullHandling.description: {NATIVE=Lets the data store decide what to do with nulls., NULLS_FIRST=A hint to the used data store to order entries with null values before non-null entries., NULLS_LAST=A hint to the used data store to order entries with null values after non-null entries.}

ascending.description: Returns whether sorting for this property shall be ascending.

descending.description: Returns whether sorting for this property shall be descending.

empty.description: Returns whether the current{@link Streamable} is empty.

nullHandling.description: {NATIVE=Lets the data store decide what to do with nulls., NULLS_FIRST=A hint to the used data store to order entries with null values before non-null entries., NULLS_LAST=A hint to the used data store to order entries with null values after non-null entries.}

ascending.description: Returns whether sorting for this property shall be ascending.

descending.description: Returns whether sorting for this property shall be descending.

parameters.name: resourceType
parameters.description:
UNKNOWN :UNKNOWN
IMAGE :IMAGE
VIDEO :VIDEO
AUDIO :AUDIO
TEXT :TEXT
DOCUMENT :DOCUMENT
ARCHIVE :ARCHIVE
EXECUTABLE :EXECUTABLE
OTHER :OTHER
